cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this problem step by step. So the question is about figuring out between what times Leslie could have gone to the beach, given the information provided. Let me start by listing out all the details given. First, we know that Leslie woke up at 5am. Then there are several people who saw Leslie doing different activities at different times: - Emily saw Leslie attending class from 5am to 9am. - Anthony saw Leslie watching a movie from 9am to 11am. - Thomas saw Leslie buying cookies from 11am to 4pm. - Ashley saw Leslie fixing their computer from 4pm to 5pm. - Susan saw Leslie walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. Also, the beach was closed after 10pm. So the earliest Leslie could have gone is after waking up, but we need to check when they were available. Let me create a timeline of Leslie's activities based on the information: 1. 5am: Wakes up. 2. 5am - 9am: In class (Emily). 3. 9am - 11am: Watching movie (Anthony). 4. 11am - 4pm: Buying cookies (Thomas). 5. 4pm - 5pm: Fixing computer (Ashley). 6. 9pm - 10pm: Walking towards Statue of Liberty (Susan). Now, the beach was closed after 10pm, so Leslie must have gone before 10pm. Also, they can't be at the beach and doing another activity at the same time. So let's look at the possible time gaps when Leslie wasn't doing any of these activities. After waking up at 5am, they are in class until 9am. Then from 9am to 11am, they're watching a movie. Then from 11am to 4pm, they're at the bakery. Then from 4pm to 5pm, they're fixing a computer. Then there's a gap from 5pm to 9pm. After that, from 9pm to 10pm, they're walking towards the Statue of Liberty, and the beach is closed after 10pm. So the only time when Leslie isn't doing any of the reported activities is from 5pm to 9pm. Let me verify that: - 5pm to 9pm: After fixing the computer at 5pm, there's no reported activity until 9pm when they're walking towards the Statue of Liberty. So between 5pm and 9pm, Leslie is unaccounted for. Therefore, Leslie could have gone to the beach during that 5pm to 9pm window, as long as they left before 10pm when the beach closed. So the answer would be option (A) 5pm to 9pm. Let me double-check the options given: (A) 5pm to 9pm (B) 9am to 11am (C) 9pm to 10pm (D) 4pm to 5pm Option B is when Leslie was watching a movie. Option C is when Leslie was walking towards the Statue of Liberty, and the beach was closed after 10pm, so going to the beach during 9-10pm might not be possible because it's closing. Option
